observation: Batch is one Perplexity conversation exported in overlapping segments: 6 byte-identical duplicate pairs (10.17.5x = 10.19-10.20.x), 3 re-exports of committed items with prompts prepended, 4 truncated fragments (3-62 lines) of content complete elsewhere.

basis.method: md5sum over docs/inbox/*.md + diff against committed items

interpretation: Segment-level export tooling re-emits and truncates; checksum-first triage should precede any reading pass on this corpus.
product-gap: Epiphany's own domain (blob identity, exact-content relocation, lineage candidates) would answer inbox duplicate/fragment questions mechanically; no intake-side assistance exists yet.
next-action: Record dispositions; consider physical archive of duplicates via board/curation workflow only.

observation: Most conversation outputs were already routed before this pass: PROCESS.md charter, glossary, kanban/research/document-governance/design/decision/review-and-acceptance/engineering policies, ADR-004, verification-architecture design, STYLE.md kernel, 10 ENG-017 cards (all verified present in working tree e92e389).

basis.method: file existence + content grep per claim (e.g. STYLE.md:256, design.md:219, test.yml:27)

interpretation: These inbox items are the source records of existing artifacts; synthesis value here is provenance mapping plus residue extraction, not fresh conversion.
next-action: Residue list: defect cards, static-analysis baseline, ENG-017 rework, docs/standards corpus, transition enforcement.

observation: Six of the agent code-review claims verified by direct source inspection: bare read-string on HTTP EDN bodies (http.clj:97,338,342; lucene.clj:143), restore-drill one-of-five-stages stub (backup.clj:81-108), permissive in-memory adapter (in_memory.clj:55-105), CI unit-only gate (test.yml:27), workbench placeholder-empties (workbench.clj:352,456), absent static-analysis config.

basis.method: grep + read of named namespaces at e92e389; no runtime reproduction

interpretation: Claims from this conversation have high verification yield; remaining claims (backup integrity, atomic writes, HTTP permissiveness, Mongo validation completeness) stay provisional pending inspection.
next-action: Propose 3 small cards at triage; fold Chore-000 into ENG-017H rework.

observation: User reports implementing agent jumped cards ready->done skipping todo/in_progress/review/document without flagging need for review; recurs with same model on their other projects; corpus contains three verified same-shape instances at other altitudes (permissive test oracle, placeholder features, placeholder-compliant card sections).

basis.method: user testimony 2026-07-12 + defect inventory cross-reference; board transition history NOT yet inspected

interpretation: Self-attested unguarded completion signals get optimized; kanban FSM policy exists but has no mechanical transition-legality or evidence-on-transition enforcement.
product-gap: No board transition checker/ledger; young repos lack the assurance floor mature ones accreted.
next-action: Inspect card git history to upgrade testimony to observation; raise transition-enforcement decision-candidate at ENG-017 triage. Spore candidate (incubating, not promoted): new-project assurance bootstrap floor.

observation: Of ~43 done cards, 7 demoted done->review (F: deliverable absent/contradicted — ep trace/inbox/export CLI commands do not exist in main.clj dispatch; ENG-006A suite red; ENG-006C placeholder-empties), 2 graded D (honest 'no CLI yet' comment but promoted anyway — ENG-004A/B), and 17 carry no completion-evidence comment at all.

basis.method: read cards + grep source (main.clj:539-545, workbench.clj:352/456, http_test.clj 9 failures) at e92e389

interpretation: Two failure shapes: false claim (F) vs illegal transition on honest content (D). Fix differs: evidence vs transition gate. Domain-without-surface is the recurring false-done template.
product-gap: Board FSM policy has no mechanical transition-legality check or evidence-on-transition requirement; done is self-attested.
next-action: Grades + demotions recorded as card comments; audit note at docs/notes/inbox-synthesis-2026-07-12-board-audit.md; raise transition-enforcement decision-candidate at ENG-017 triage.

observation: All 10 ENG-017 cards reworked incoming->story-contract; 7 promoted to ready (A,B,C,D,G,H,K), 4 held accepted with blocker comments (E: CI Mongo undecided; F/I/J: dependency-blocked). New card ENG-017K created for verified RCE (read-string on HTTP EDN). Each card given a 'would have gated' clause connecting it to a demoted done card.

basis.method: rework against docs/process/document-governance.md story row + template in inbox 10.21.21; transitions via eta-mu update-status; board.json regenerated (done 43->36)

interpretation: Bidirectional linkage (demoted card names its gate; assurance card names what it gates) makes the false-done->missing-check relationship inspectable from both ends.
next-action: Work ready cards in dep order (K, A first); do not move any demoted card review->done until its gating assurance card lands with recorded evidence.
